hero.title:
Everything the incumbents ship,
inside the Eulex.ai environment.
hero.tagline: Integrated Croatian and European legal content.
hero.subtitle: Eulex Desk reads your documents, cites verbatim and writes with you — from first draft to signature.
hero.imageCaption: Eulex Desk — reads, cites and writes with you

signin.title: Sign in and get started.
signin.subtitle: Existing EULEX users go straight into Eulex Desk. No account? Create one in seconds.
signin.legalNotice: By signing in, you accept the terms of service and privacy policy on eulex.ai.

demo.title:
Question. Document. Citation.
On a single screen.
demo.description: Ask in English or Croatian, Eulex Desk opens your documents, extracts the relevant passage and quotes it exactly — including page and article. No guessing, no fabricated sources.

features.title:
Everything Harvey and Legora ship,
refined for Croatian and European practice.
features.subtitle: You pay for context only. Token-transparent pricing.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.description: A chat that reads your documents, cites verbatim and runs multi-step workflows. Drafts and edits contracts end-to-end. Plug in your own Claude, Gemini, OpenAI or Mistral keys.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Matter-scoped workspaces. Upload credit agreements, SPAs, leases and diligence packs — the assistant keeps full context across every conversation and every document.

tabular.title: Tabular review
tabular.description: Data extraction across hundreds of documents in parallel. Every cell cited back to a page and passage — no hallucinated answers, no dead links.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.description: Proven prompts packaged as firm-wide templates — CP checklists, credit agreement summaries, change-of-control reviews. One click and a junior runs it solo.

selfhost.title:
Start in the cloud.
Or clone the repo.
selfhost.tagline: Hosted in trusted cloud. Yours or ours.

deploy.title: Self-hostable by design.
deploy.description: Deploy inside your own infrastructure. Documents never leave your perimeter. Compliance, data residency and privilege stay under your control.

cost.title: Zero license cost.
cost.description: No vendor lock-in. No per-seat pricing that rises every year. You pay only the model API costs — use Claude, Gemini or OpenAI with your own keys.

fork.title: Fork it. Extend it. Own it.
fork.description: Add practice-specific workflows, integrate your DMS, wire in your own citation engine. The codebase is yours to shape.

audit.title: Audit every line.
audit.description: No black boxes around how prompts are built, how citations are parsed, or how data flows. Open code, open prompt-engineering.

why.title:
Your firm. Your keys.
Your data.

byok.title: Integrated Croatian and European legal content.
byok.description: Eulex Desk connects your documents with relevant Croatian and European sources, with citations you can verify and defend.

eulex.title: Secure EULEX sign-in.
eulex.description: Single sign-on through your EULEX account. No new passwords, no parallel systems — access stays under your firm's control.

integrations.title: Word, Drive, OneDrive, Box.
integrations.description: Microsoft Word add-in for working directly inside the document, plus connectors for Google Drive, OneDrive and Box. Your documents stay where they already live.

bilingual.title: Croatian and English.
bilingual.description: The full interface, citations and workflows work in both languages. Models understand and reply in the language you address them in.

cta.title: Start today.
cta.subtitle: Open a free EULEX account. No contract, no credit card — up and running in 60 seconds.

footer.tagline: Eulex Desk — your firm's legal AI platform.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.managedByEulex: Account registration is managed through EULEX
signup.createOnEulex: Create your free account on eulex.ai, then come back here to sign in.
signup.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. After confirming you will be signed in.

pii.title: Anonymization (PII)
pii.description: Anonymization of queries and uploaded documents is available with the Pro plan. Upgrade to protect personal data before it's sent to the AI.

word.title: Word Add-in
word.description: The Word add-in for side-by-side document review is available with the Pro plan. Upgrade to connect Eulex Desk with Microsoft Word.

mcp.title: Context
mcp.description: Connecting external tools via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) is available with the Pro plan. Upgrade to add legal databases, web research, and internal APIs as context in chat.

profile.title: Profile
profile.countryHint: Used to calculate VAT for the Plus subscription. Synced with your eulex.ai profile.
profile.vatNumberHint: EU VAT registration number. Shown on your invoice and may allow zero-rating on B2B purchases. Synced from your eulex.ai profile.

plan.title: Usage Plan
plan.modalSubtitle: Compare the plans and pick the one that suits you best.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: For the first question. No commitment.
features: EU regulation (EUR-Lex corpus)
European national law corpus (basic)
Save up to 5 research projects
Document analysis
PDF export (EULEX-branded)
Daily usage limit
Trial access to Eulex Desk legal workbench
MCP access with daily usage limit

plus.name: Plus
features: 5x daily usage limits
Full access to Eulex Desk legal workbench
Share research results via link
Word and Markdown export of research
Full MCP access with daily usage limit

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For the professional who needs more.
features: Including one national deep coverage pack including timeline and temporal snapshots*
20x daily usage limit to support full day usage of Eulex Desk
Anonymization of query and uploaded documents
Word Plugin for side by side document review
Company billing

legal_pro.name: Legal Pro
features: 80x daily usage limit to support full day usage of Eulex Desk
Use your own API-keys to extend AI capacity at cost
Customer support to define workflows

team.name: Team
features: Share Workbench projects
Login with your company account to protect your data
Add users as your company grows
Usage limit pooled across the whole team
Minimum 5 seats

eulex_legal_team.name: Legal Team
features: 80x daily usage limit to support full day usage of Eulex Desk
Use your own API-keys to extend AI capacity at cost
Customer support to define workflows
Minimum 5 seats

enterprise.name: Enterprise
features: Custom integration with your knowledge base
Private cloud and hybrid deployment
Provide Eulex functionality to your customers without Eulex account

plan.manageBillingHint: Invoices, payment method and subscription cancellation — securely via Stripe.

billing.title: Billing & tokens
billing.subtitle: An overview of your daily usage and top-ups.
billing.topupSuccess: Payment successful. Your tokens will be credited within a few seconds.
billing.topupCancelled: Payment was cancelled — you have not been charged.

team.title: Team
team.seatsFull: All seats are taken. Remove a member or add more seats.
team.hint: An added colleague gets access immediately; if they don't have an account yet, they're linked on first login. Add colleagues to a specific case from within that case.

models.title: Model Preferences
models.localLlmNote: LocalLLM models are configured by the server administrator and are available to all users.

apiKeys.title: Providers
apiKeys.addKeyTooltip: {provider} is currently unavailable on this Eulex Desk instance.
apiKeys.serverManagedDescription: All providers (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral) run through shared keys configured by the administrator. Your usage is metered against your subscription plan.

connectors.title: Context
connectors.description: Context plugs external tools into Eulex Desk via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — legal-data sources, web research, internal company APIs, and so on. Tools discovered from each context source become available to the chat assistant under the mcp__<slug>__<tool> name.

trustWarning.title: Only add context sources you trust
trustWarning.description: A context source's operator can see anything Eulex Desk sends in tool calls — your prompts, document excerpts, and the tool's own response. Custom headers (including Authorization tokens) are sent on every request.

addForm.name: Name
addForm.apiKeyHeadersDesc: For servers that accept a static token. You paste it as a custom header below.
addForm.oauthDiscoverDesc: For spec-conformant servers. You'll sign in via a popup — no token to paste.
addForm.customHeadersHint: Sent on every request. Common usage: Authorization → Bearer <token>.

card.nameContainedSecret: Name contained what looks like a secret — displayed redacted. Edit the server to fix.
card.builtinHint: Preset context — you can disable it, but the configuration is managed by the administrator.

confirm.removeMessage: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"? This also deletes any saved sign-in tokens.
confirm.resetOauthTitle: Reset OAuth and sign in again
confirm.resetOauthMessage: This wipes saved tokens and re-registers Eulex Desk with "{name}" from scratch. Use when the context source is stuck on "Client Not Registered" or refuses to refresh. You'll be asked to sign in again.

alerts.noAuthorizeUrl: Authorization server did not return a URL.
alerts.popupBlockedMessage: Couldn't open the sign-in window — check your popup blocker and try again.

assistant.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Answers are not legal advice.

piiPreview.errorStrict: The document was not attached (strict mode). Try again or change the mode in privacy settings.
piiPreview.errorOpen: The document was attached without a PII review. Check your connection and try again for full protection.

editCard.viewDisabledTitle: This change has been resolved and is no longer in the document.

modelToggle.triggerAria: Choose model and reasoning effort. Currently {model}.
modelToggle.apiKeyMissingTitle: API key missing for selected model

effort.label: Reasoning effort
effort.offTitle: No reasoning — the model answers directly.
effort.lowTitle: Faster, cheaper. Minimal thinking before responding.
effort.mediumTitle: Balanced. A moderate amount of thinking before responding.
effort.highTitle: Deepest thinking. Slower and more expensive, best on hard problems.

enrichment.tooltip: Turns a short question into a more precise query with relevant context.
enrichment.selectVariant: Select one of the improved queries:

webSearch.label: Web
webSearch.tooltipOn: Web search is on — Eulex Desk can check official sources, the web, and news. Click to turn off.
webSearch.tooltipOff: Web search is off — Eulex Desk answers without searching the internet. Click to turn on.

legalSource.noText: No text available for this source.

wordAddin.title: Word Add-in
wordAddin.description: Use Eulex Desk directly inside Microsoft Word. The add-in connects to this account so your projects, chats, and uploads stay in sync.

pair.title: 1. Generate a pairing code
pair.description: Each code is valid for 5 minutes and can be redeemed only once. After a Word add-in is paired, the access stays active until you sign out from Word.

install.title: 2. Install the add-in in Word
install.step2: In Word, open the Insert tab, click Add-ins → Get Add-ins → Upload My Add-in.
install.step3: Select the downloaded manifest.xml. The Eulex Desk sidebar will appear on the Home tab.
install.step4: Open the Eulex Desk pane and paste the 6-digit pairing code when prompted.

use.title: 3. Start working
use.description: Once paired you can chat with Eulex Desk, attach project documents, request track-change suggestions, and let the assistant comment on a selection — all without leaving Word.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

connectorsPage.title: File sources
connectorsPage.description: Connect Google Drive, OneDrive, or Box to import documents directly into Eulex Desk. Files are copied into Eulex Desk at import time — later changes in the source don't modify the imported copy.
connectorsPage.empty: No file context sources are available right now. Contact your administrator.
connectorsPage.contactAdmin: The operator has not configured this context

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the context list.
errors.startFailed: Failed to start the OAuth flow.

privacy.title: Privacy & PII
privacy.subtitle: Settings for the privacy proxy that anonymizes documents and prompts before they reach the language model.
privacy.notConfigured: PII Shield is not deployed in this environment yet — your choices are saved but currently have no effect.
privacy.modeOffDesc: Send everything to the AI in plaintext. No anonymization.
privacy.modeStandardDesc: Detect and mask PII automatically. No review prompt.
privacy.modeStrictLegalDesc: Recommended for legal work — masks personal names, organisations and addresses by default and asks you to review every document.
privacy.modeStrictDesc: Same as Strict (legal), plus the AI cannot make up new placeholders — it must use only those you confirmed.
privacy.reviewRequired: Always show review prompt before sending to AI
privacy.reviewRequiredDesc: Even in Standard mode, open the review modal once per document so you can confirm what gets masked.
privacy.demoTitle: What the pre-AI review screen looks like
privacy.demoSubtitle: In strict modes and when 'always require review' is on, a modal with the detected data opens before every AI call. Click below to see what it looks like on a sample contract.

shieldBadge.tooltip: Personal data in this chat is replaced with placeholders before it reaches the AI.

previewModal.title: Review detected PII
previewModal.subtitle: Check the data we recognized. Items left unchecked stay hidden from the AI; check an item to expose it.

rateLimit.title: Document withheld
rateLimit.body: The PII proxy is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few seconds.
